name: The Code Dungeon

enemies.name: Null Pointer
enemies.description: Points to absolutely nothing. Still hurts.

enemies.name: Off-by-One Error
enemies.description: Always attacks one space to the left of where you'd expect.

enemies.name: Memory Leak
enemies.description: Slowly grows larger. Takes up more and more space.

enemies.name: Race Condition
enemies.description: Sometimes attacks first. Sometimes second. Never predictable.

enemies.name: Dep Hell Demon
enemies.description: Requires 47 other demons to function. All outdated.

enemies.name: Deadlock
enemies.description: Waiting for you. You're waiting for it. Nobody moves.

enemies.name: Stack Overflow
enemies.description: Recursion without a base case. Growing infinitely.

bosses.name: The Spaghetti Monster
bosses.description: A tangled mass of code paths that no one dares refactor.

bosses.name: The Monolith
bosses.description: 10 million lines. One file. No tests. Deployed on Friday.

bosses.name: The Legacy System
bosses.description: Written in 1997. No documentation. 'It works, don't touch it.'

traps.name: Undefined Behavior
traps.description: The floor crackles with undefined behavior!

traps.name: Deprecated API
traps.description: You step on a deprecated API endpoint!

traps.name: Hidden TODO
traps.description: A hidden TODO: fix this later strikes!

empty: An empty server rack hums quietly.
Keyboard clacking echoes in the distance.
A whiteboard covered in faded diagrams.
rest: A cozy break room with a working coffee machine.
A quiet corner with a beanbag chair.
treasure: A dusty package.json with something shiny inside.
An old deploy artifact with valuables.
A forgotten stash of dev tools.

floor_flavor: The hum of legacy code fills the air...
Error messages flash on abandoned monitors.
You hear the distant cry of a failed CI pipeline.
boss_clues: The code style becomes increasingly inconsistent...
Dependency version numbers are scrawled on the walls.
You find a crumpled design document with warnings.
